description: UI toggle for enabling/disabling MVDR dual-mic beamformer in main_screen.dart. SwitchListTile with Icons.spatial_audio, persisted in Hive settings_box with key beamformingEnabled (default false). Calls AudioBridgeImpl().setBeamformingEnabled(enabled) on toggle change.
steps: 1. Add a _BeamformingToggleCard StatefulWidget to main_screen.dart following the pattern of existing toggles (DNN, Conversation Mode, Smart Scene).
2. In initState, read the beamformingEnabled value from Hive settings_box (default false) and set initial switch state.
3. On toggle change, call AudioBridgeImpl().setBeamformingEnabled(enabled) and persist to Hive.
4. Place the toggle in _ActiveView among other DSP toggles.
5. Use SwitchListTile with Icons.spatial_audio, title 'Beamforming 2-Mic', subtitle 'MVDR: prioriza voz frontal, atenúa ruido lateral'.
acceptance_criteria: SwitchListTile with Icons.spatial_audio, title 'Beamforming 2-Mic', subtitle as specified
State persisted in Hive settings_box with key 'beamformingEnabled', default false
Reads initial value from Hive on screen init
Toggle placed in the active view among existing DSP toggles
verification: Visual inspection of Dart syntax correctness
Verify the toggle follows existing patterns in the file
findings: Toggle implemented following the _DnnNoiseCleanerCard pattern. Uses Card + SwitchListTile for consistent Material look. Placed after DNN card in _ActiveView. No dart analyzer available in sandbox, but structural checks (brace/paren/bracket balance) all pass. AudioBridgeImpl import was already present in the file.
